name: acen_origin_analytic
description: ACEN stage-conformance, Mode.Origin (task 0342 Phase 3): trivial constant world (0,0,0), independent of mesh/selection state (source/toolpipe/stages/actcenter.d computeCenter's Mode.Origin arm returns Vec3(0,0,0) unconditionally). Two cases pin the SAME golden under different selections to demonstrate the selection-independence explicitly rather than assuming it from a single case.
source: Analytic -- Mode.Origin is a hard-coded constant in the stage under test, no reference measurement needed (no formula to derive). Cross-checked against a live vibe3d run at authoring time.
